title: Quarter Volume Library Prep Step 1: Enzymatic Fragmentation and End Prep
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform enzymatic fragmentation and end prep steps on 48-96 input samples. User-determined parameters are available for selection of the labware for the 96-well library prep and reagent plates and the aluminum block and tube combination holding reagents on the temperature module. ---
steps_raw: This protocol uses multi-channel P20 and P300 pipettes to perform enzymatic fragmentation and end prep steps on 48-96 input samples. User-determined parameters are available for selection of the labware for the 96-well library prep and reagent plates and the aluminum block and tube combination holding reagents on the temperature module. ---
Set up - be sure to pre-cool the Temperature Module to 4 degrees C using settings in the OT app prior to running this protocol.
The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents in sufficient volume are present on deck.

The p300 multi will use a single tip on the rear-most channel to deliver reaction buffer to the mix tube, then deliver enzyme mix to the mix tube, mix, and deliver the mixture (fragmentation mastermix) to the first column of the reagent plate.
Using the first column of the reagent plate as source, the p20 multi will deliver fragmentation mastermix to each sample in the library prep plate.
materials_raw: Opentrons Filter Tips for the P20 and P300 (https://shop.opentrons.com)
Selected 96-well PCR plate ([see parameter dropdown list below] https://labware.opentrons.com/)
Selected 24-well Aluminum Block and Tube Combination ([see parameter dropdown list below] https://labware.opentrons.com/)
Opentrons 8-channel P20 and P300 Gen2 Pipettes (https://shop.opentrons.com/pipettes/)
NEBNext® Ultra™ II DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina, Catalog # E7645S / E7645L (https://international.neb.com/products/e7645-nebnext-ultra-ii-dna-library-prep-kit-for-illumina#Product%20Information)

NEBNext® Ultra™ II FS DNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina, Catalog # E7805S / E7805L (https://international.neb.com/products/e7805-nebnext-ultra-ii-fs-dna-library-prep-kit-for-illumina#Product%20Information)
